subject: fix(ui): clarify header subtitle with filtered vs total change count
body:
Replace jargon "commits" with plain "changes". When filters are active,
show "Showing X of Y changes" so users know they're viewing a subset.
When no filters, show "Y changes". Non-technical users can now tell at
a glance whether data is filtered.

Tags: ui, ux, accessibility
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
